headline: Bitcoin Holds $30k Amid S&P 500 Short Squeeze Looms

article.title: Bitcoin price avoids major Iran jitters as S&P 500 ‘short squeeze’ on horizon

headline: Eurozone Eyes 2025 Digital Euro Launch Amid Cash Decline

article.title: The digital euro: Surveillance money, or a better alternative to cash?
article.summary: Proponents of the digital euro say its a better alternative to cash that’s fully backed by the ECB. But critics argue it could provide the EU with too much power over its citizens.

headline: Saylor's Strategy Sees 170% Upside on Wall Street

headline: Aston Martin Secures £550M HPS Debt Infusion
